title: Applications for assistance
doc_html:
§104.  Applications for assistance

Applications for assistance shall be in writing in the manner and upon the form prescribed by the department.  

Amended by Acts 1978, No. 786, §6, eff. July 17, 1978.
doc_text:
§104.  Applications for assistance
Applications for assistance shall be in writing in the manner and upon the form prescribed by the department.
Amended by Acts 1978, No. 786, §6, eff. July 17, 1978.
